name: Tilactase
description: Tilactase is a chewable tablet that contain beta-D-galactosidase. Also known as lactase, beta-D-galactosidase is a glycoside hydrolase enzyme that catalyzes the hydrolysis of β-galactosides. Enzymes contained in tilactase is obtained from Aspergillus oryzae, a probiotic filamentous fungus. Tilactase is available in various countries to be used as an alternative therapeutic approach for lactose-intolerant patients who lack lactase enzymes. It can be taken orally before ingesting a lactose-containing meal.
